name: Ryder Student Transportation
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (not directly confirmed)
notes: No active FMCSA SAFER carrier record found under the name 'Ryder Student Transportation' in Burnsville MN. SAFER keyword search for 'RYDER STUDENT' returned no records. 'Ryder Student Transportation' was Ryder System's school-bus division (peaked late 1990s) that was sold to FirstGroup in 1999 for $940M and became First Student; the legacy 'Ryder Student Transportation Services' brand no longer operates as an independent carrier. The Yelp listing at 3400 Highway 13 W, Burnsville, MN 55337 is now occupied by First Transit / First Student per multiple business directories. The Burnsville-Eagan-Savage School District 191 currently contracts with Schmitty & Sons (3100 Hwy 13 W). Treat as defunct/legacy brand for tuck-in purposes.

name: Superior School Bus Inc
entity_status: unknown (possibly active per OpenCorporates us_nj/0450338307 hit but page behind captcha)
registry_source: New Jersey Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly confirmed)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found under 'Superior School Bus' in Clark NJ or anywhere in NJ. SAFER keyword search for SUPERIOR SCHOOL/SUPERIOR BUS returned only NY, FL, PA, and TX entities - no Clark NJ match. NJ Department of Education school bus contractor codes list does not include 'Superior School Bus' (only 'Superior Transport'). OpenCorporates entry us_nj/0450338307 appears to match by name but page returns a captcha challenge so entity details (inc date, officers, status) could not be verified. A separate 'Superior School Bus Co.' operates in Brooklyn NY (957 Dean St, founded 1988, ~55 buses) - different entity. The Clark NJ 'Superior School Bus Inc' at 18 Fairview Rd may be a small/dormant entity without FMCSA registration. Treat with caution as a tuck-in target until NJ DORES filing can be confirmed manually.
